items.name_en: Victoria Beckham Style Chanel Sheepskin Apricot
items.name_cn:
Victoria Beckham Style Chanel Sheepskin Apricot
Out of Print Large Gold Clasp Bag❤️
In Stock. The Chanel Classic Flap Bag was re-released by Karl Lagerfeld in 1983 after taking over Chanel. It is also Lagerfeld's most proud masterpiece. This large CF is very popular among celebrities and bloggers.
Its highlight is the large double C logo with gold plating. The current boutique version no longer has this design; they all have small double Cs. Victoria Beckham likes to shorten the chain of this bag and use it as a handbag.
It features a double-sided flap design with a large capacity for a chain bag. It is lightweight and can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or as a handbag with a shortened chain.
Recommended to buy the Victoria Beckham bag😘
Size 30 21.8cm
No.: A2222

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M12583 Large. This Medium CarryAll Dark handbag features a soft calfskin to create a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a standout look to 2024 Spring/Summer runway styles. Polished metal hardware contrasts with a soft-touch pebbled texture. Ample space to hold various daily essentials, making it a perfect travel companion. 39 x 30 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M43986 VANITY Bag. Inspired by the historic LV Cannes vanity case. Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière reimagines the charm of a classic with this semi-rigid bag. Small size. Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas mix. Distinctive Louis Vuitton design. Very elegant. Features a top handle and detachable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying options. Size 15x17x15cm

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M83566 PM83566 Monogram. This Nano Diane features a Monogram canvas body with leather corners and a traditional buckle, recreating vintage details like the rounded flap and belt-style closure. Spacious enough for a phone and daily essentials, with a detachable handle and adjustable/removable shoulder strap for versatile carrying, suitable for day or night. Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

items.name_en: M46740 New Monogram Double Star saumurbb, a mini version of the Double Star featuring a saddle bag silhouette. This charming Monogram mini bag is simply irresistible! The bag features a handle for hand, crossbody, or underarm carrying, and the strap is detachable. A must-have that is often out of stock! Dimensions: 20*16*7.5cm

items.name_en: [Chipped Version] Model: M46373 This OnTheGo small handbag combines Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant pattern. Toron handles and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin purse is suitable for storing coins or small items. Combining fashion and versatility, it makes a perfect daily companion. 25.0 x 19.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)
